insights: Positioned in JNV Vyas Colony — Bikaner's most densely populated planned colony — at C-165, a residential block. Listed on fitness platforms like AdviceFit. insights: Distinct from the similarly-named 'Arogyam The Fitness Zone' (BKN-013) — this is a separate establishment in Vallabh Garden.
